zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche於1136年出生在法國布列塔尼時，他的父親Geoffrey la Zouche32歲，母親Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany37歲。他於1174年與Adelicia de Belmeis在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1171年移民到英國。他去世於1190年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche was born in 1136, in Brittany, France, his father, Geoffrey la Zouche, was 32 and his mother, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, was 37. He married Adelicia de Belmeis in 1174, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He immigrated to England in 1171. He died in 1190, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche est né en 1136, à Bretagne, France, son père, Geoffrey la Zouche, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Adelicia de Belmeis en 1174, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il a immigré au Angleterre en 1171. Il est décédé en 1190, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche 1136 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey la Zouche 32 und seine Mutter Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany 37. Er hat 1174 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Adelicia de Belmeis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er ist 1171 nach England eingewandert. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche(이)가 1136년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey la Zouche(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1174년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 Adelicia de Belmeis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1171년에 영국로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche nasceu em 1136, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Geoffrey la Zouche, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelicia de Belmeis em 1174, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele imigrou para o Inglaterra em 1171. Ele faleceu em 1190, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche родился в 1136 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey la Zouche было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelicia de Belmeis в 1174 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он иммигрировал в Англия в 1171 году. Он умер в 1190 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

Se casó con Adelicia de Belmeis en 1174, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Inmigró a Inglaterra en 1171. Murió en 1190, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
